texto: A word is like a finger pointing at different things. Do not look at the finger
autor: focus on the essence of the word. Focus on what the finger is pointing at!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a focus on the essence of the word. Focus on what the finger is pointing at!: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “A word is like a finger pointing at different things. Do not look at the finger” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, choa-kok-sui, finger pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
